sections.paragraph:
verb להיאלם

become dumb, mute

verb לאלם

to bind, sheaf; to silence

verb להתאלם

become dumbfounded, mute, silent

verb לאלם (>>אילם)

to bind, sheaf; to silence

masculine noun

dumbness, muteness, silence, speechlessness

masculine noun and adjective אלם (>>אילם)

dumb, mute, tongueless
